definition.nodes: Steps within an assignment or workflow task, including attributes like position, status, dependencies, and color coding.
goals: View, manage, and track nodes dynamically.
Support nodes for assignments and future workflows (e.g., films).

files.name: app.py
files.purpose: Defines Flask routes for nodes, assignments, and tasks.

files.name: models.py
files.purpose: Database interaction for nodes and assignments.

files.name: nodes.py
files.purpose: Additional backend logic for node management.

files.name: HTML Files
files.purpose: Frontend for adding, editing, and viewing nodes.
